title: Wanaka Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Wanaka, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance. Plan your family holiday with our expert tips and save up to 40% on activities with Bookme.co.nz.
intro: Planning a family holiday to Wanaka? With its stunning lake, relaxed town, and plenty of outdoor activities, Wanaka is an ideal destination for families. We've got the inside scoop on the best family deals and discounts to help you save money and make the most of your trip. From activity discounts to campervan hire and travel insurance, we've got you covered.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
Wanaka is a great destination for families, with plenty of activities to suit all ages. Right now, you can save up to 40% on activities with Bookme.co.nz, including popular attractions like Puzzling World and ski passes for Treble Cone Ski Area.

If you're planning to hire a campervan, Discover Cars has some great deals on family campervans from just $89/day. And with Booking.com, you can book holiday parks and motels with free cancellation on most bookings.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on most bookings with Booking.com

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities in Wanaka
sections.body:
Wanaka has plenty of activities to suit all ages and budgets. Some of the best-value activities include visiting Puzzling World, taking a scenic walk along the Wanaka Lakeshore, and hiring kayaks or paddleboards to explore the lake.

In the winter, Treble Cone Ski Area is a great destination for families with older kids, with a range of trails to suit all skill levels.

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips for Families
sections.body: Here are some top tips to help you save money on your family holiday to Wanaka:
list: Book activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices
Consider hiring a campervan instead of booking separate accommodation and transport
Pack a picnic lunch instead of eating out
Take advantage of free activities like the Wanaka Lakeshore walk and Mt Iron track
Use Bookme.co.nz to save up to 40% on activities
Buy a family pass for attractions like Puzzling World instead of individual tickets

sections.heading: When to Book for the Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices on activities, accommodation, and campervan hire, it's a good idea to book in advance. For peak season (December to February), it's recommended to book at least 2-3 months in advance to avoid missing out on the best deals.

For off-peak season, you can often get better prices by booking just a few weeks in advance.
